title: bromus canadensis subsp. yezoensis
intro: Bromus canadensis subsp. yezoensis, also known as Japanese brome or Yezo brome, is a subspecies of the Canadian brome plant, a type of grass native to Japan and other parts of East Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bromus canadensis subsp. yezoensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate sore throats and coughs, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health issues.
